title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services:
Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services!
